sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check new player position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
blue_player = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24]
p = blue_player[0]['boundary']
print(f"Player now at rows {p[0][0]}-{p[2][0]}, cols {p[0][1]}-{p[2][1]}")

# Check area to the right
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print(f"\nRows 8-12, cols 19-30:")
for i in range(8, 13):
    print(f"{i:2d}: {ascii_lines[i][19:30]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
